name: ai-app-test-platform
description: AI app testing MVP with RAG-style context retrieval, stored test cases, Maestro flow generation, regression selection, and reports.

scripts.check: PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/private/tmp/test_ai_pycache python3 -m py_compile ai_test_platform/server.py ai_test_platform/db.py ai_test_platform/models.py ai_test_platform/rag.py ai_test_platform/ai_client.py ai_test_platform/file_ingestion.py ai_test_platform/figma_mcp.py ai_test_platform/generator.py ai_test_platform/maestro.py ai_test_platform/regression.py ai_test_platform/report.py
